name: Language
description: Materials and activities for oral language development, writing preparation, reading, and grammar

works.name: Vocabulary Enrichment
works.description: Building vocabulary through conversation and objects

works.description: Matching real objects to their picture representations

works.description: Clapping, counting, and breaking words into syllables for phonological awareness

levels.name: Clapping Syllables
levels.description: Clap out syllables in familiar words

levels.name: Syllable Blending
levels.description: Hear separated syllables and blend into word

levels.name: Syllable Deletion
levels.description: Remove a syllable — what word is left?

Memory Games

levels.name: Single Phonetic Words
levels.description: Teacher says CVC words, child writes

levels.description: Copy short passages of poetry or prose

levels.description: Words starting with bl, cl, fl, etc.

levels.name: Final Blends
levels.description: Words ending with nd, mp, etc.

levels.name: Double Letters

levels.name: Consonant Digraphs

levels.name: Other Phonograms
levels.description: ow, ou, oi, oy, aw, etc.

levels.name: First Set
levels.description: the, a, is, to, and, etc.

works.description: Analyzing words while reading

works.name: Reading Classification
works.description: Reading and classifying words and concepts

works.name: Silent Reading

works.description: Small objects matched to phonetic word cards for reading practice

levels.name: CVC Objects
levels.description: Simple three-letter word objects: cat, pen, cup

levels.name: Blend Objects
levels.description: Objects with blends: frog, drum, stamp

works.description: Hidden messages the child reads to discover actions, treasures, or surprises

categories.name: Grammar
categories.description: Parts of speech and sentence structure

works.name: Introduction to the Noun
works.description: Understanding nouns as naming words

works.name: Introduction to the Article
works.description: Understanding articles as noun introducers

works.name: Introduction to the Adjective
works.description: Understanding adjectives as describing words

works.name: Introduction to the Verb
works.description: Understanding verbs as action words

works.name: Introduction to the Adverb
works.description: Understanding adverbs modify verbs
directAims: Understanding adverbs describe how, when, where

works.name: Introduction to the Pronoun
works.description: Understanding pronouns replace nouns

levels.name: Personal Pronouns
levels.description: I, you, he, she, it, we, they

levels.name: Possessive Pronouns
levels.description: my, your, his, her, our, their

works.name: Introduction to the Preposition
works.description: Understanding prepositions show position

works.name: Introduction to the Conjunction
works.description: Understanding conjunctions connect words

works.name: Introduction to the Interjection
works.description: Understanding interjections express emotion

works.name: Grammar Boxes
works.description: Sentence analysis with fill-in activities

works.name: Sentence Analysis
works.description: Advanced sentence structure analysis

works.name: Logical Adjective Game
works.description: Using 63 triangles varying in size, color, and shape to find the exact one described
works.controlOfError: Wrong triangle selected — description must be more precise
works.chineseName: 蒙特梭利逻辑形容词游戏

works.name: Detective Adjective Game
works.description: Verbal descriptions to find hidden objects around the room
works.controlOfError: Wrong object found — description needs refinement
works.chineseName: 蒙特梭利侦探形容词游戏

works.name: Logical Adverb Game
works.description: Commands with adverbs showing how actions change
works.chineseName: 蒙特梭利逻辑副词游戏

levels.name: Movement Adverbs
levels.description: Walk slowly, walk quickly, walk quietly

levels.name: Manner Adverbs
levels.description: Sing loudly, speak softly, draw carefully

works.name: Verb Command Game
works.description: Written commands on slips that the child reads and acts out
works.controlOfError: Action doesn't match the written command
works.chineseName: 蒙特梭利动词命令游戏

levels.name: Verb + Object
levels.description: open the door, close the book

levels.name: Complex Commands
levels.description: Walk to the window and wave to someone outside

works.name: Conjunction Exercise
works.description: Sensorial experience of joining words and ideas with conjunctions
works.controlOfError: Sentence doesn't make sense without the conjunction

levels.name: And
levels.description: Bring the cup AND the saucer

levels.name: But/Or
levels.description: Choose this OR that / I want to BUT I can't

works.name: Preposition Exercise
works.description: Physical placement of objects using preposition commands
works.controlOfError: Object not placed in correct spatial relationship

works.name: Singular and Plural
works.description: Object box exercise distinguishing one from many
works.controlOfError: Singular card placed with plural objects or vice versa

works.name: Function of Words
works.description: Introductory lesson showing that words have different jobs in a sentence using grammar symbols
materials: Grammar symbol cards (large triangle, small triangle, circle, etc.)
directAims: Understanding that words serve different functions

levels.name: Noun and Verb Discovery
levels.description: Show that sentences need naming words and action words

levels.name: Adding Descriptors
levels.description: Show how adjectives change the noun

levels.name: Expanding Sentences
levels.description: Add articles, prepositions to build longer sentences

works.name: Sentence Building
works.description: Structured progression from single words to complete sentences using word cards
materials: Word cards (colour-coded by part of speech)
works.controlOfError: Sentence does not make sense when read aloud

levels.name: Complete Sentences
levels.description: Build full sentences with capitals and periods

levels.name: Sentence Transformation
levels.description: Change statements to questions and commands

works.name: Sentence Diagramming
works.description: Visual representation of sentence structure showing relationships between parts of speech
works.controlOfError: Diagram does not match sentence structure

levels.name: Subject and Predicate
levels.description: Divide sentence into who/what and what happened

levels.name: Modifiers
levels.description: Show how adjectives and adverbs connect

works.name: Verb Tense Work
works.description: Exploring past, present, and future verb tenses through conjugation cards and sentence transformation
materials: Verb tense cards (colour-coded: red for present, blue for past, green for future)
works.controlOfError: Verb form does not match the tense indicated

levels.name: Present Tense
levels.description: Identify and use present tense verbs

levels.name: Conjugation Charts
levels.description: Complete conjugation charts for common verbs

categories.name: Word Study

works.name: Word Families
works.description: Words that share the same ending pattern

works.name: Spelling Rules
works.description: Common spelling patterns and rules

works.name: Compound Words
works.description: Words made of two smaller words

works.name: Prefixes and Suffixes
works.description: Word parts that change meaning

levels.name: Common Suffixes
levels.description: ed, ing, s, es, er, est

works.name: Synonyms and Antonyms
works.description: Words with similar and opposite meanings

works.name: Homonyms
works.description: Words that sound the same but differ in meaning

works.name: Definition Stages
works.description: Progressive exercise from naming to describing to formal defining
works.controlOfError: Definition doesn't accurately describe the object

works.name: Root Words and Word Origins
works.description: Exploring root words, word families, and how words are built from common roots
works.controlOfError: Derived word does not share the root

levels.name: Common Roots
levels.description: Identify root in word families (e.g., play → player, playful, replay)

levels.name: Latin and Greek Roots
levels.description: Explore common Latin/Greek roots (aqua, terra, port)

levels.name: Word Building from Roots
levels.description: Build new words from root + prefix + suffix

levels.name: Word Origin Stories
levels.description: Discover where interesting words come from

works.name: Poetry Analysis
works.description: Analysing poems for rhyme, rhythm, imagery, and meaning
materials: Coloured pencils for marking rhyme and rhythm
works.controlOfError: Analysis does not match the poem structure

levels.name: Rhyme Identification
levels.description: Mark rhyming words with coloured pencils

levels.name: Rhythm and Beat
levels.description: Clap or march the rhythm of a poem

levels.name: Imagery and Meaning
levels.description: Discuss what the poet is describing

levels.name: Comparing Poems
levels.description: Compare two poems on the same theme
